programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A former punk rocker is overwhelmed with tragedy, and his constant roughhousing with the employees draws Taffer's ire.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A Chinese immigrant must come out of his shell and battle his emotional manager to save his dream beach bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Ybor City, Fla., Jon helps rescue a bar owner who made some questionable choices on the theme, decor, and menu in her bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer heads to Port St. Lucie, FL to help two partners save their failing bar, regain their confidence, and learn how to properly run a business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: A Twice in a Lifetime Opportunity
programme.desc: In his second re-rescue, Jon Taffer returns to Champagne's Cafe to help the struggling bar survive the pandemic and maintain its Las Vegas legacy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A historic bar in Sheboygan, Wisc. faces closure because of an owner with a bad attitude whose staff is afraid to speak out against him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: One morning in an ordinary town, five people are shot dead in a seemingly random attack; all evidence points to a single suspect: an ex-military sniper who is quickly brought into custody; Reacher, an enigmatic ex-Army investigator, believes the authorities have the right man but agrees to help the sniper's defense attorney.. However, the more Reacher delves into the case, the less clear-cut it appears.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Departed
programme.desc: South Boston cop Billy Costigan (Leonardo DiCaprio) goes undercover to infiltrate the organization of gangland chief Frank Costello (Jack Nicholson). As Billy gains the mobster's trust, a career criminal named Colin Sullivan (Matt Damon) infiltrates the police department and reports on its activities to his syndicate bosses. When both organizations learn they have a mole in their midst, Billy and Colin must figure out each other's identities to save their own lives.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

However, the more Reacher delves into the case, the less clear-cut it appears.

programme.desc: Jon tries to get a bevy of beautiful barmaids to stop The Bamboo Beach Tiki Bar from failing.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An owner relies on her attractive daughters and spaghetti wrestling events to lure customers inside, but mounting debt and a family feud threaten the future.

programme.desc: Two meatheads' tempers and testosterone threaten their friendship and their Houston bar.

programme.desc: Taking on a hot-tempered New Jersey bar owner who can't stop kicking people out of his bar.

programme.desc: Jon heads to Phoenix to help a veteran bar owner who borrowed money from her family.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Carlyle, IL a cajun-themed bar needs rescuing due to its out of control food costs and untrained management and staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer heads to Melbourne, Florida to help rescue a former radio entrepreneur turned bar owner who has suffered personal losses that have caused his business to suffer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians, former showgirl Rachel Phelps (Margaret Whitton), has a sweetheart deal to move the team to Miami. But to break the lease with the city of Cleveland, ticket sales have to plummet. So Phelps hires the most incompetent players available, including near-blind pitcher Rick Vaughn (Charlie Sheen) and injury-prone catcher Jake Taylor (Tom Berenger). But her villainous tactics accidentally foster a can-do team spirit, turning the Indians into potential winners.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: After discovering his girlfriend has been participating in group sex, attorney Mitch feels his world come undone. He moves into a new place, which happens to be near a college campus, and tries to get his life back together. Two of his best friends, Frank and Beanie, start hanging out at Mitch's house, eventually turning the place into a wild party pad, much to the ire of the college's dean, Gordon "Cheese" Pritchard.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians, former showgirl Rachel Phelps (Margaret Whitton), has a sweetheart deal to move the team to Miami. But to break the lease with the city of Cleveland, ticket sales have to plummet. So Phelps hires the most incompetent players available, including near-blind pitcher Rick Vaughn (Charlie Sheen) and injury-prone catcher Jake Taylor (Tom Berenger). But her villainous tactics accidentally foster a can-do team spirit, turning the Indians into potential winners.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to motivate the inattentive owner of a failing Portland music venue that has an ant infestation; attempting to amp up the business before the stage goes dark for good.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A military hero on the verge of being redeployed needs his own rescue; he needs help before he drinks away his profits and angers his girlfriend past to the point of no return.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The distrustful owner of a struggling military bar spends her time spying on her staff instead of paying attention to her bottom line.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Two burned-out rockers lose $200,000 just two years into owning their bar; they have to face the music and grow up before their lights turn off for good.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Taffer tries to corral an out-of-control staff, the owner's freeloading friends and a violent physical fight threatens the bar's rescue potential.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon arrives at Bottoms Up to discover a staff running wild, a manager lacking courage to control his staff, and an owner ready to sell her bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Downey, Jon tasks Phil Wills to help an iconic live music venue get back on its feet, after years of neglect and mismanagement.
